style_bible.visual_style: Naturalistic colors with slight warm tones, shallow depth of field to isolate the subject, subtle film grain for texture
style_bible.camera_rules: Use smooth camera movements, avoid sudden cuts, maintain consistent screen direction, keep the subject centered or following the rule of thirds
style_bible.lighting_rules: Soft, diffused key lighting from the left side, balanced fill light to reduce harsh shadows, warm color temperature around 3200K
style_bible.continuity_rules: Maintain identical wardrobe and props on the main subject, keep background elements consistent, ensure lighting direction and intensity remain stable across scenes

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Introduce a young woman in casual blue jeans and white shirt standing in a sunlit modern kitchen holding a steaming mug.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: young woman, blue jeans, white shirt, shoulder-length brown hair, holding a ceramic mug
- location: modern kitchen with wooden countertops, potted plant on windowsill, stainless steel appliances

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, subject centered
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward
- subject & action: woman lifts mug to lips by 1s, sips by 2s, lowers mug by 3s
- environment details: sunlight through window, green plant leaves, coffee machine on counter
- lighting: soft natural light from left, warm color temp
- cinematic look: slight film grain, moderate contrast, shallow depth of field

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on face, subject slightly right of frame
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: woman smiles gently at camera by 5s, blinks slowly by 7s
- environment details: blurred background, faint steam from mug
- lighting: soft fill light from front, warm tone
- cinematic look: smooth skin tones, subtle bokeh

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium wide shot, subject left of frame
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow pan right
- subject & action: woman sets mug down on counter by 8s, turns head to window by 10s
- environment details: sunlight reflections on counter, plant leaves moving slightly
- lighting: directional soft light from left
- cinematic look: natural colors, gentle shadows

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly forward, static close-up, slow pan right
scenes.audio_cue: soft morning ambient sounds with faint kettle whistle

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show the woman noticing a sudden power outage and reacting with surprise in the same kitchen.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: young woman, blue jeans, white shirt, shoulder-length brown hair, holding ceramic mug
- location: modern kitchen with wooden countertops, potted plant on windowsill, stainless steel appliances

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, subject centered
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: handheld subtle
- subject & action: woman looks up startled by 1s, eyes widen by 2s, mouth opens slightly by 3s
- environment details: lights flicker, coffee machine stops, shadows deepen
- lighting: sudden dimming, cooler color temp
- cinematic look: increased contrast, slight motion blur

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on face, subject right of frame
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: woman blinks rapidly by 4s, looks toward window by 6s, frowns by 7s
- environment details: darkened background, faint streetlight glow outside window
- lighting: low key, soft shadows
- cinematic look: moody lighting, shallow depth of field

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium wide shot, subject left of frame
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow pan left
- subject & action: woman sets mug down carefully by 8s, reaches for phone on counter by 10s
- environment details: dim kitchen, phone screen glow
- lighting: minimal ambient light, cool tone
- cinematic look: muted colors, subtle highlights

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: handheld subtle, static close-up, slow pan left
scenes.audio_cue: sudden silence, faint electrical hum stops

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Depict the woman lighting a candle on the kitchen counter, restoring warm light and calm.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: young woman, blue jeans, white shirt, shoulder-length brown hair, holding ceramic mug
- location: modern kitchen with wooden countertops, potted plant on windowsill, stainless steel appliances

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, subject centered
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly backward
- subject & action: woman picks up candle by 1s, strikes match by 2s, flame ignites by 3s
- environment details: dark kitchen, candle box on counter, faint window outline
- lighting: warm candle glow, soft shadows
- cinematic look: warm color grading, gentle contrast

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on hands and candle, subject slightly right
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: woman holds candle steady by 5s, places it on counter by 7s
- environment details: flickering flame, textured wooden countertop
- lighting: warm, soft, flickering
- cinematic look: shallow depth of field, warm highlights

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium wide shot, subject left of frame
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow pan right
- subject & action: woman smiles softly by 8s, looks around kitchen by 10s
- environment details: candlelight illuminating plant leaves, soft shadows on walls
- lighting: warm, cozy ambiance
- cinematic look: natural colors, smooth gradation

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly backward, static close-up, slow pan right
scenes.audio_cue: soft crackling of candle flame, quiet ambient room tone
